creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=065c811cfc470bd7495c11f895b7ae0bd2bb8dde

commit 065c811cfc470bd7495c11f895b7ae0bd2bb8dde
Author:     Don Lewis <truckman@FreeBSD.org>
AuthorDate: 2022-04-26 18:08:39 +0000
Commit:     Don Lewis <truckman@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2022-04-26 18:19:28 +0000

    devel/opengrok: Upgrade to version 1.7.31

    Upgrade opengrok to the latest upstream version to fix CVE-2021-2322,
    which was actually fixed upstream in 1.6.7.

    Convert the wrapper script from /bin/csh to /bin/sh.

    Jave 11+ is required.

    PR:             260534
    MFH:            2022Q2
    Security:       1135e939-62b4-11ec-b8e2-1c1b0d9ea7e6

 devel/opengrok/Makefile                   |  90 ++-------
 devel/opengrok/distinfo                   |   6 +-
 devel/opengrok/files/opengrok.in          |  15 +-
 devel/opengrok/files/pkg-message.in (new) |  18 ++
 devel/opengrok/pkg-message (gone)         |   8 -
 devel/opengrok/pkg-plist                  | 291 ++++++++++++++----------------
 6 files changed, 173 insertions(+), 255 deletions(-)
